stemHtml:
Given the following data for the pre-flight calculations, determine the required alternate fuel for a Commercial Air Transport flight with a Performance Class A aeroplane. Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Fuel for missed approach at destination: 300 kg
Fuel for climb to cruising level: 850 kg
Cruise distance to alternate: 170 NAM
Fuel consumption (cruise): 6 kg/NAM
Fuel for descent to alternate: 120 kg
Fuel for approach and landing at alternate: 210 kg
Fuel flow for holding at alternate: 2 200 kg/hr
Fuel for missed approach at alternate: 170 kg
